user.title: Tibber Live — Connect your account
user.description: Enter your Tibber API token. You can find it at https://developer.tibber.com/ under 'Load personal token'.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Tibber API. Please check your network connection.
error.invalid_token: Invalid API token. Please verify your token at developer.tibber.com.
error.no_realtime_homes: No homes with real-time support found. A Tibber Pulse or Watty device is required.

abort.already_configured: This Tibber account is already configured.
